run.observationSummary:
WAIT is valid at both horizons.
Clone Larvae is currently energy-blocked: current Energy 0, cost 12000, deficit unknown.
House of Mirrors is currently energy-blocked: current Energy 0, cost 2500, deficit 2500.
The snapshot is valid with formula provenance warnings.
No comparison against the blocked abilities was performed because they were not legal at t=0.

observationSummary.text:
WAIT is valid at both horizons.
Meat/sec is unchanged because Phase 1 does not spend added larvae.
House of Mirrors leads for territory production at 300 seconds.
House of Mirrors shortens Expansion ETA compared with WAIT.
The snapshot is valid with formula provenance warnings.

first.observationSummary:
WAIT is valid at both horizons.
Meat/sec is unchanged because Phase 1 does not spend added larvae.
House of Mirrors leads for territory production at 300 seconds.
House of Mirrors shortens Expansion ETA compared with WAIT.
The snapshot is valid with formula provenance warnings.
